name: node-js-yaml
title: node-js-yaml
description:
YAML 1.2 parser and serializer
This is an implementation of YAML, a human-friendly data serialization
language. Started as PyYAML port, it was completely rewritten from scratch.
Now it's very fast, and supports the 1.2 spec.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use js-yaml because YAML 1.2 parser and serializer.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use js-yaml as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair js-yaml with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `js-yaml --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
